page_title: Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein
text:
Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein (, Hantā × Hantā Ryūmyaku no Saidan) is an action-adventure RPG video game and the seventh video game of Hunter × Hunter developed by Konami. It was released in Japan on August 30 th , 2001 for the PlayStation 2.

Gameplay

The gameplay consists of the player character and an AI ally exploring one of the select areas on the map. To move, the player must use the left joystick. Various enemies will appear throughout. Unless it’s a scripted battle, the player may either run past or fight them. The game’s primary hub is Netero’s personal airship. Here, the player will either progress the story or obtain side quests. Side quests typically involve revisiting certain areas to gather items for NPCs. 

Fighting consists of hitting the ∆ or □ buttons for normal attacks. ◯ is used for dash attacks. Doing either of these will cause the aura gauge to lower, resulting in a temporary cooldown for attacks. Using the L1 button will cause the player character to use their finishing technique. While giving the most damage input, its usage requires at least one marker above the player’s life gauge. Said markers can be obtained by fighting enemies. For the remaining controls, the X button is for side-stepping or dodging enemies. To lock onto enemies, the player must hit the R1 button. This is best used for boss fights. Lastly, the right joystick can partially control the current ally.

Trivia

On the PurePure 2 Volume 2 disc, a demo of the game is included. Notable differences include the following:
The player is unable to switch to other characters minus Gon and Killua. While Leorio can be seen on the start screen, the player is unable to choose anyone on the change menu. teapotcutie "PurePure 2 Volume 2 Demo: Hunter x Hunter Altar of Dragon Vein" YouTube. 
When on the airship, the player cannot leave Netero's office. 
One of the plants in said office can be clipped through. 
There are no side quests nor items. 
The demo ends once the Kiriko boss fight is over.
